calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-20-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger

Petitioner: Marilyn Lindsey Mullins, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Marilyn Anthony Lindsey
Decree signed in open court

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Amended Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
